nodes.label: AI as time-saving code generator for repetitive tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I might see myself using AI to help generate code while I'm working on these projects to help me save time

nodes.label: AI as bridge for unfamiliar programming languages
nodes.grounding_span: I might use it to generate code for a coding language that I'm not very well-versed in

nodes.label: AI as ideation partner for analysis direction
nodes.grounding_span: AI actually provided tons of surprisingly adept suggestions for statistical tests, analysis direction, and ideas for me

nodes.label: AI output quality and error risk
nodes.label_negative: AI output reliability and error-free code
nodes.grounding_span: I miss an error that the AI output within the code

nodes.label: Workplace gray area around AI use
nodes.label_negative: Openly sanctioned or discouraged AI use
nodes.grounding_span: it's in this sort of gray area, where people don't talk about it

nodes.label: AI use as secretive or cautious due to workplace norms
nodes.grounding_span: I've been much more cautious about my usage of AI as it's not something that I would want people to know that I use

nodes.label: Maintaining foundational skills vs. relying on AI for niche details
nodes.label_negative: Full reliance on AI for all knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: it's always good to maintain a basic level of understanding of things like coding languages and statistical tests

nodes.label: AI as fundamental to current productivity norms
nodes.label_negative: Working without AI at previous productivity levels
nodes.grounding_span: it has become so fundamental to my efficiency nowadays, that without it -- I don't think I would be able to output what has become the 'norm'

nodes.label: Competence and skill maintenance
nodes.grounding_span: maintain a basic level of understanding

nodes.label: Professional reputation and avoiding scrutiny
nodes.grounding_span: caused me a lot of a paranoia in assuming that they thought I was using AI in my work

nodes.label: Enjoyment and variety in work
nodes.grounding_span: I genuinely like this as it's not something that I usually do during my usual day-to-day operations

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for ideation
nodes.grounding_span: AI actually provided tons of surprisingly adept suggestions

nodes.label: Frustration and paranoia from AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: caused me a lot of a paranoia in assuming that they thought I was using AI in my work

nodes.label: Cautious reliance on AI due to workplace ambiguity
nodes.grounding_span: I've been much more cautious about my usage of AI

nodes.label: Acceptance of AI as essential for current output
nodes.grounding_span: it has become so fundamental to my efficiency nowadays

nodes.label: Methodical step-by-step explanation to avoid misunderstandings
nodes.grounding_span: explain it in a very methodical way to ensure that mistakes or misunderstandings don't happen

nodes.label: Quality assurance and testing orientation
nodes.grounding_span: I would never hand it off completely and I find that my job is much too detail-oriented and I personally would not be comfortable without testing it out or at least QAing the results
